ofm.title: 2026 platform crackdown is live
ofm.summary: Biometric verification, AI detection tools, and 30-40% revenue drops for violators. DMs still drive 60-70% of income — AI chatbots can't match human emotional connection yet.

ofm.title: OnlyMonster
ofm.summary: has emerged as the dominant OFM platform — Beta growth purely through product, no marketing. Heavy AI integration for agency workflows.

ofm.title: Fanvue raised $22M Series A
ofm.summary: (Jan 2026) from Inner Circle (same investors as Revolut/Anthropic). Now the clear leader for AI model direct monetization.

ofm.title: AI influencer market worth $6-8B
ofm.summary: , forecasted to grow through 2026. Predicted to capture 30% of influencer marketing budgets. Top earners: Lil Miquela ($2M/yr), Aitana López (€10k/mo).

ofm.title: Supercreator
ofm.summary: now offers full AI account operation for agencies when implemented correctly with transparency.

tools.title: Claude Code Auto Mode shipped March 24, 2026
tools.summary: — zero-approval automated development with AI safety classifier watching every tool call. Real game-changer for workflow automation.

tools.title: OpenClaw 2026.3.22
tools.summary: released with 45 new features, secrets system, safer defaults, PDF tool, plugin API compatibility fixes. Moves it from "demo setup" to daily ops ready.

tools.title: Agentic AI shift accelerating
tools.summary: By 2026, ~40% of business workflows won't be managed by humans clicking buttons — agents will plan, execute, and course-correct in real-time.

tools.title: Standardized tool connectivity
tools.summary: is becoming the core shift in agent architectures — less custom glue code, more composable agents following Unix philosophy.

market.title: Tulum ATV competition
market.summary: TulumATVRental.com running aggressive positioning ("no competitors"), weekly rentals at $300. Multi-day self-guided tour packages becoming standard.

market.title: Puerto Escondido development accelerating
market.summary: La Punta boutique developments with infinity pools/ocean views attracting international buyers. Infrastructure upgrades (water, roads, drainage) planned for Brisas de Zicatela 2025-2026.

market.title: New air routes planned for 2026
market.summary: Canadian and additional US connections being planned for Puerto Escondido airport — will extend booking horizon for North American travelers. United already added Houston route April 2025.

market.title: Rammed earth construction
market.summary: Earth USA 2026 conference Sept 18-20 in Santa Fe. Baja Blox doing compressed earth blocks in Baja California — prefab block approach reduces construction time/costs.
